\tzpentry{ID5095}{Berry Phase}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5095 introduces Berry Phase as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
\(\gamma_{\mu\nu}=g_{\mu\nu}+n_\mu n_\nu\)
\]
